codeExamples.title: Insertion Sort Implementation

python.code:
def insertion_sort(arr):
    for i in range(1, len(arr)):
        key = arr[i]
        j = i - 1
        
        while j >= 0 and arr[j] > key:
            arr[j + 1] = arr[j]
            j -= 1
        
        arr[j + 1] = key
    return arr

# Binary insertion sort (fewer comparisons)
def binary_insertion_sort(arr):
    from bisect import bisect_left, insort_left
    result = []
    for x in arr:
        insort_left(result, x)
    return result

arr = [12, 11, 13, 5, 6]
print(insertion_sort(arr))

codeExamples.description: Insertion sort builds sorted array incrementally
